name: IgnitionSim
descriptor: The engineer's guide to sim hardware — racing, flight, space, and beyond.
heroSubhead: Compatibility-checked builds, honest gear reviews, and restock alerts for every sim discipline.
eyebrow: // SIM HARDWARE, DECODED BY AN ENGINEER'S EYE

author.name: Robert Pruitt
author.bio: Two decades in technical recruiting across engineering, robotics and machine learning — a systems-thinking obsessive who tests the gear so you don't gamble on it.

newsletter.blurb: The spark for your next upgrade — restock + deal alerts, no noise.

disclosure: IgnitionSim is reader-supported. When you buy through links on our site we may earn an affiliate commission at no extra cost to you — it never changes our verdict or your price. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases.
